description: YES BANK cloud-architecture compliance rule set. Edit, add, or disable rules here — the evaluator in services/compliance.py picks them up automatically. Order is preserved in the report.

rules.title: WAF / edge guard precedes application tier
rules.pass_message: All external ingress passes through an edge guard (WAF / CDN / API gateway / load balancer).
rules.fail_message: External traffic terminates on a component that is not an edge guard (WAF / CDN / API gateway / load balancer).

rules.title: Data tier is not exposed in public trust zones
rules.pass_message: No data-tier components are exposed in a public trust zone.
rules.fail_message: Data-tier components are placed in a public trust zone (external / perimeter / DMZ).

rules.title: TLS / mTLS on all external-facing edges
rules.pass_message: All external edges use encrypted protocols.
rules.unknown_message: Encryption could not be confirmed on one or more external edges.

rules.title: Encryption on traffic entering restricted zones
rules.pass_message: All edges into restricted zones are encrypted.
rules.fail_message: Edges to restricted zones use plaintext protocols.
rules.unknown_message: Encryption could not be confirmed on edges entering a restricted zone.

rules.title: Private endpoints for managed data services
rules.pass_message: Azure PaaS components are paired with a private endpoint.
rules.fail_message: Azure PaaS components lack a Private Endpoint in their trust zone.

rules.title: Identity provider on external flows
rules.fail_message: External flows exist but no identity provider is shown.

rules.title: Logging / monitoring / SIEM is present
rules.fail_message: No logging, monitoring, or SIEM component shown on the diagram.

rules.title: Secrets vault for databases / SaaS connections
rules.fail_message: Databases or third-party SaaS present, but no secrets vault is shown.
rules.not_applicable_message: No databases or third-party SaaS components detected.
